label: Transparent agave rosette motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Agave transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a desert garden agave rosette botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A large architectural agave rosette with stiff blue-grey spear leaves, sage-green undertones, cream edge highlights, charcoal terminal spines, hard desert shadow planes, and symmetrical radial structure. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, sculptural xeric identity, no aloe gel leaves.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full spiky rosette from a three-quarter top angle without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no small aloe plant, no cactus pads, no flower stalk, no pot, no desert landscape, no hand, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Agave light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Agave", derived from the visible transparent desert garden agave rosette cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible architectural SaaS system.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Use short labels, spacious modules, and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Agave, Agave Rosette, Light Mode, Palette, Typography, English, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from blue-grey spear leaves, sage blade undertones, cream leaf edges, charcoal spines, pale desert dust, and stone shadows. The board must read as agave, not aloe, cactus, yucca, or generic enterprise UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, SaaS navigation, enterprise dashboard metric cards, data table, filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, desert-cream backgrounds, agave-blue-grey primary actions, sage-blade secondary controls, cream-edge highlights, spine-charcoal borders, spear-leaf alignment, subtle waxy-leaf texture. Quiet utilitarian architectural SaaS, not a marketing page.
Color palette: blue grey, sage, cream, shadow, pale dust, spine charcoal; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Constraints: no aloe gel leaves, no cactus pads, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Agave", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Agave dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Agave". It must feel like the visible Morphous Agave light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible desert garden agave rosette cutout.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Use short labels, spacious modules, and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Agave, Agave Rosette, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, English, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the light board structure, component coverage, typography guidance, token roles, SaaS dashboard density, and agave visual language. Use the visible light board as the layout reference and convert it to dark mode. Preserve the motif-derived palette: agave-shadow dark backgrounds, desert-cream text, agave-blue-grey active controls, sage-blade surfaces, cream-edge chart highlights, spine-charcoal dividers, waxy-leaf texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as agave, not aloe, cactus, yucca, or generic enterprise UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, SaaS navigation, enterprise dashboard metric cards, data table, filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: agave-shadow and stone-shadow surfaces, desert-cream foreground, agave-blue-grey controls, sage-blade accents, cream-edge highlights, spine-charcoal dividers, subtle waxy-leaf overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls. Quiet utilitarian architectural SaaS, not a marketing page.
Constraints: no aloe gel leaves, no cactus pads, no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Agave".
